step_rationale: Endothelial dysfunction marker; homocysteinylated LDL enhances atherogenic lipid accumulation.
mechanism: Elevated homocysteine impairs endothelial function and promotes oxidative modification of LDL, accelerating atherosclerotic lipid retention and plaque vulnerability.
